programme.title: Savage Millennial Vs Savage Gen Z
programme.desc: The video explores the generational divide through a series of "savage" exchanges between a Millennial (struggling to keep up) and a Gen Z protagonist (who seems to have a slang for everything). It highlights the hilarious friction that occurs when Millennial "hustle culture" meets Gen Z "boundaries."

programme.title: Life In Boy's School
programme.desc: The video is a high-energy, chaotic exploration of the "survival game" that is an all-boys school. It captures the specific brand of brotherhood, unfiltered humor, and lack of decorum that defines these institutions, moving away from typical co-ed romance to focus purely on the "bro" dynamic.

programme.title: People We See In Every Exam!
programme.desc: The video is a humorous "field guide" to the specific personalities you encounter in a high-pressure examination hall. It captures the frantic, sometimes absurd behavior of students during those three hours of "do or die" academic battle.

programme.title: What If Dhurandhar Was Set In An Office?
programme.desc: The sketch reimagines the intense, high-stakes world of international espionage as the equally "dangerous" jungle of a modern 9-to-5 office. It follows an undercover agent who is sent into a rival firm—not to stop a terror cell, but to prevent the poaching of a major client.

programme.title: Life In A Girls' School
programme.desc: The video explores the "behind-the-scenes" reality of growing up in an all-girls environment—shattering the dainty stereotypes often seen in movies and replacing them with the raw, chaotic, and fiercely loyal brotherhood (or sisterhood) that actually exists.

programme.title: Gen Z Gf Millennial Bf
programme.desc: The story follows a couple navigating the humorous friction that arises when a Millennial's "old school" habits clash with a Gen Z's digital-first lifestyle. It moves beyond simple "slang" jokes to show how their different outlooks on work, romance, and even weekend plans create both conflict and a unique kind of balance.

programme.title: Life In Iit
programme.desc: The video moves past the "glamour" of the IIT brand to show the gritty, exhausting, and heartwarming reality of hostel life. It follows three roommates as they navigate the transition from being "JEE toppers" in their hometowns to being "average students" in a campus full of geniuses.

programme.title: Parents On Facebook
programme.desc: The video is a satirical look at the digital generation gap. It follows a son (Dhruv) as he deals with the social media "awakening" of his mother (Kritika), who approaches Facebook with the same intensity and lack of boundaries she uses in real-life parenting.

programme.title: Confusing Things Girlfriends Say
programme.desc: The video is a comedic "survival guide" for boyfriends trying to navigate the often contradictory and cryptic language of their significant others. It humorously deconstructs the hidden meanings behind common phrases that leave men scratching their heads.

programme.title: Annoying Things Boyfriends Do
programme.desc: While the first video looked at the "mysterious" language of girlfriends, this sketch flips the perspective. It humorously catalogs the predictable, clumsy, and often thoughtless habits of boyfriends that test their partners' patience.

programme.title: What Not To Say In A Relationship
programme.desc: The video follows a series of scenarios where a partner says the absolute worst possible thing at a sensitive moment. It highlights how even a small, unintentionally honest comment can be interpreted as a declaration of war.

programme.title: Things Brothers & Sisters Do
programme.desc: The video is a rapid-fire montage of the daily friction and unspoken affection that defines a sibling bond. It moves past the "emotional" stereotypes to show the hilarious, grounded reality of living under the same roof.

programme.title: Last Diwali Before Moving Out
programme.desc: When you are leaving your house, every moment becomes unforgettable especially festivities like Diwali which makes core memories of growing up Desi.

programme.title: If Google Were A Delhi Boy
programme.desc: The video imagines how Google might behave if it were a stereotypical “Delhi boy” — flashy, informal, always full of attitude. It plays with contrasts like professionalism vs. casual swagger, creating funny scenarios when tech meets typical Delhi-style personality.

programme.title: When You Grow Up With Strict Desi Parents
programme.desc: The video humorously shows the challenges of growing up with strict Desi parents, from high expectations to limited freedom.

programme.title: When You Are The Only Girl In The Group
programme.desc: You’re the lone girl surrounded by guys – every conversation, joke or decision seems to orbit around you. The video captures the awkward, funny, and endearing moments you tweak just to “fit in.”

programme.title: Annoying Things Husbands Do
programme.desc: From forgetting dates to TV remote fights—an affectionate roast of husbands everywhere.

programme.desc: The video humorously portrays the unique traits and behaviors of an Aquarius partner, highlighting their independent and unpredictable nature.

programme.desc: A funny sketch on dating a Pisces and their dreamy, emotional ways. Their moods and charm make every moment unpredictable.

programme.title: Signs You Are Becoming Like Your Partner

programme.title: 8 Funny Things That Happen In A Father-Son Relationship
programme.desc: The video is a collection of relatable "micro-moments" that define the bond between a father and son. It captures the transition from a relationship based on authority to one based on friendship, albeit with the classic "dad" quirks remaining intact.

programme.title: Every Roadtrip Ever
programme.desc: The video captures the chaotic, funny, and predictable cycle of an Indian road trip with friends. It moves through the high expectations of the planning phase to the messy (but memorable) reality of actually being on the road.

programme.title: Annoying Things People Do In Your Car
programme.desc: The video is a comedic breakdown of the various ways passengers can drive a car owner (the "driver") absolutely crazy. It captures the struggle of trying to keep your car pristine while your friends treat it like a public lounge.

programme.title: Types Of Shoppers
programme.desc: The video humorously identifies and satirizes the various personas we all adopt the moment we step into a shopping center. It breaks down the stereotypes of shopping and, in classic FilterCopy fashion, flips the script on gendered expectations—showing that men can be just as obsessive or indecisive as women when it comes to fashion.

programme.title: Thoughts You Have While Studying
programme.desc: The video is a comedic dive into the brain of a student who is desperately trying to focus but is constantly derailed by distractions, procrastination, and existential dread. It perfectly captures the "pre-exam" struggle where everything in the world seems more interesting than the textbook in front of you.

programme.title: Backbenchers Vs Toppers
programme.desc: The sketch reimagines the battle between disciplined Toppers and chaotic Backbenchers as a supernatural war. Inspired by Brahmastra, it turns exams and school life into a dramatic, high-stakes fight for ultimate power.

programme.title: Savage Millennial Vs Savage Gen Z
programme.desc: The video explores the generational divide through a series of "savage" exchanges between a Millennial (struggling to keep up) and a Gen Z protagonist (who seems to have a slang for everything). It highlights the hilarious friction that occurs when Millennial "hustle culture" meets Gen Z "boundaries."

programme.title: Life In Boy's School
programme.desc: The video is a high-energy, chaotic exploration of the "survival game" that is an all-boys school. It captures the specific brand of brotherhood, unfiltered humor, and lack of decorum that defines these institutions, moving away from typical co-ed romance to focus purely on the "bro" dynamic.

programme.title: People We See In Every Exam!
programme.desc: The video is a humorous "field guide" to the specific personalities you encounter in a high-pressure examination hall. It captures the frantic, sometimes absurd behavior of students during those three hours of "do or die" academic battle.

programme.title: What If Dhurandhar Was Set In An Office?
programme.desc: The sketch reimagines the intense, high-stakes world of international espionage as the equally "dangerous" jungle of a modern 9-to-5 office. It follows an undercover agent who is sent into a rival firm—not to stop a terror cell, but to prevent the poaching of a major client.

programme.title: Life In A Girls' School
programme.desc: The video explores the "behind-the-scenes" reality of growing up in an all-girls environment—shattering the dainty stereotypes often seen in movies and replacing them with the raw, chaotic, and fiercely loyal brotherhood (or sisterhood) that actually exists.

programme.title: Gen Z Gf Millennial Bf
programme.desc: The story follows a couple navigating the humorous friction that arises when a Millennial's "old school" habits clash with a Gen Z's digital-first lifestyle. It moves beyond simple "slang" jokes to show how their different outlooks on work, romance, and even weekend plans create both conflict and a unique kind of balance.

programme.title: Life In Iit
programme.desc: The video moves past the "glamour" of the IIT brand to show the gritty, exhausting, and heartwarming reality of hostel life. It follows three roommates as they navigate the transition from being "JEE toppers" in their hometowns to being "average students" in a campus full of geniuses.

programme.title: Parents On Facebook
programme.desc: The video is a satirical look at the digital generation gap. It follows a son (Dhruv) as he deals with the social media "awakening" of his mother (Kritika), who approaches Facebook with the same intensity and lack of boundaries she uses in real-life parenting.

programme.title: Confusing Things Girlfriends Say
programme.desc: The video is a comedic "survival guide" for boyfriends trying to navigate the often contradictory and cryptic language of their significant others. It humorously deconstructs the hidden meanings behind common phrases that leave men scratching their heads.

programme.title: Annoying Things Boyfriends Do
programme.desc: While the first video looked at the "mysterious" language of girlfriends, this sketch flips the perspective. It humorously catalogs the predictable, clumsy, and often thoughtless habits of boyfriends that test their partners' patience.

programme.title: What Not To Say In A Relationship
programme.desc: The video follows a series of scenarios where a partner says the absolute worst possible thing at a sensitive moment. It highlights how even a small, unintentionally honest comment can be interpreted as a declaration of war.

programme.title: Things Brothers & Sisters Do
programme.desc: The video is a rapid-fire montage of the daily friction and unspoken affection that defines a sibling bond. It moves past the "emotional" stereotypes to show the hilarious, grounded reality of living under the same roof.

programme.title: Last Diwali Before Moving Out
programme.desc: When you are leaving your house, every moment becomes unforgettable especially festivities like Diwali which makes core memories of growing up Desi.

programme.title: If Google Were A Delhi Boy
programme.desc: The video imagines how Google might behave if it were a stereotypical “Delhi boy” — flashy, informal, always full of attitude. It plays with contrasts like professionalism vs. casual swagger, creating funny scenarios when tech meets typical Delhi-style personality.

programme.title: When You Grow Up With Strict Desi Parents
programme.desc: The video humorously shows the challenges of growing up with strict Desi parents, from high expectations to limited freedom.

programme.title: When You Are The Only Girl In The Group
programme.desc: You’re the lone girl surrounded by guys – every conversation, joke or decision seems to orbit around you. The video captures the awkward, funny, and endearing moments you tweak just to “fit in.”

programme.title: Annoying Things Husbands Do
programme.desc: From forgetting dates to TV remote fights—an affectionate roast of husbands everywhere.

programme.title: If Google Were Poo
programme.desc: A quirky comedic sketch where imagining the search-engine giant as something ridiculous (like “Poo”) highlights how absurd our online habits and dependence on instant answers have become.

programme.title: When Love Begins With Hate
programme.desc: The classic “I can’t stand you” turns into “I actually kinda like you”: fights, sarcasm, pranks—and that moment when your irritation flips into something you can’t ignore.

programme.title: Honest Office
programme.desc: What if everyone in office said what they really meant? Brutal honesty meets workplace diplomacy in a hilarious way.

programme.title: When You Date A Gujrati Guy
programme.desc: Dhokla, Garba, and budgeting—dating a Gujarati boy means love, laughter, and endless snacks.

programme.title: Life Of A Working Couple
programme.desc: The video humorously portrays the dynamics of a working couple's daily life. It highlights the challenges and humorous situations they face while balancing their professional and personal lives.

programme.title: If We Treated Fair Skin Like Dark Skin
programme.desc: A powerful social commentary flipping the fairness narrative to show everyday colorism in reverse.

programme.title: Exam Ka Pressure
programme.desc: Portrays the intense stress students face during exam time. Through relatable scenarios and witty dialogues, it highlights the universal anxiety of preparing for and taking exams.

programme.title: Struggles Of Cooking For The First Time
programme.desc: he video humorously portrays the various difficulties and comical mishaps encountered by someone attempting to cook for the first time. It highlights the relatable struggles of a novice in the kitchen, from preparing vegetables to handling spices and dealing with kitchen disasters.

programme.title: When You Date An Aquarius
programme.desc: The video humorously portrays the unique traits and behaviors of an Aquarius partner, highlighting their independent and unpredictable nature.

programme.title: Monsoon Lover V/s Monsoon Hater
programme.desc: Two personalities facing monsoon seasons: one sees romance, cozy rains, and nostalgia; the other only sees dampness, cold, and ruined plans. The video plays up their constant banter and contrasting outlooks.

programme.title: Struggles Of Mbbs Students
programme.desc: The saga of late-night studies, cadaver labs, endless rounds and telling your non-med friends what you actually do. It threads the humour and fatigue of MBBS life, where “just one chapter more” is the motto.

programme.title: When You Date A Pisces
programme.desc: A funny sketch on dating a Pisces and their dreamy, emotional ways. Their moods and charm make every moment unpredictable.

programme.title: When Opposites Attract: A Monsoon Romance
programme.desc: This romantic short film portrays a classic "opposites attract" love story between Karan, an engineer focused on logic, and Isha, a compassionate doctor. Their worlds collide during health checkups, leading to a sweet romance that blossoms amidst the monsoon, highlighting how their contrasting personalities connect.

programme.title: Girls Trip Ki Permission
programme.desc: Asking for “just one small trip” turns into logistics, calls, excuses, and dramatic parental negotiations—as the girls try to sneak out but end up doing it all out in the open.

programme.title: Things That Give You Mini Heart Attacks Part 2
programme.desc: Those tiny moments that make your heart skip: phone wakes up by itself in the night, weird app notification while you’re alone, “did-I-just-send-that?” mistakes—little jolts of panic we all experience.

programme.title: Reality Of An Overachiever
programme.desc: What looks like constant success and sparkle on the outside hides the pressure, burnout, self-doubt and never-ending “what-next” questions that come with being the high-achiever everyone expects so much from.

programme.title: When A Love Marriage Becomes Arranged
programme.desc: They fell in love the modern way, but then the families stepped in—and suddenly what was spontaneous turns into “official” with rituals, expectations and relatives.

programme.title: Unexpected Awkward Moments After An Arranged Marriage
programme.desc: Arranged marriages are supposed to be all romantic and smooth, right? Well, not exactly. After the ""yes"", the real fun begins! From awkward silences to ""ab kya baat karen?"" moments, ice-breaking feels like the hardest task on earth!

programme.title: Reality Of A Neet Aspirant
programme.desc: This sketch humorously and relatably dives into the life of a NEET aspirant, showcasing the emotional rollercoaster of anxiety, last-minute revisions, and unsolicited advice from relatives. It highlights the pressure, panic, and unique struggles faced by students preparing for one of India's toughest exams.

programme.title: Reality Of Being A Teacher
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of teaching: the lesson planning, parent-teacher meetings, juggling different learners, fatigue, small wins, big hopes—more real than the “glamour” you think teachers have.

programme.title: If Mother-In-Law Could Hear Your Thoughts | Part 2
programme.desc: The chaos continues as unspoken thoughts once again spill out, turning every polite exchange between mom-in-law and daughter-in-law into hilarious honesty.

programme.title: If Mom-In-Law Could Hear Your Thoughts
programme.desc: A comical imagining of a daughter-in-law’s inner monologue being heard by her mother-in-law — where politeness meets pure panic.

programme.title: Fashion Conversations With Your Bff
programme.desc: A lighthearted glimpse into how best friends hype, roast, and brutally critique each other’s outfit choices while pretending to be fashion experts.

If You Acted Like Harry Potter Characters In Real Life
programme.desc: A parody imagining how Hogwarts characters’ quirks would play out in normal, everyday situations.

programme.title: Awkward Moments With Parents
programme.desc: This video comically portrays the various awkward situations that arise between young adults and their parents. It highlights relatable moments of parental overprotectiveness, unintentional embarrassments, and the generational gap in understanding.

programme.title: Indian Parents During Winters
programme.desc: From “put on more clothes” to the thermostat wars, random health advice and the dramatic shift in household routines—winter reveals a whole new set of parent-modes.

programme.title: Little Things Couples Do
programme.desc: The video highlights the small, sweet moments couples share in daily life. It shows how these little gestures make relationships special.

programme.title: Things Girl Roommates Do
programme.desc: Two (or more) female roommates navigate shared spaces, stealing each other’s snacks, borrowing clothes, gossip sessions and midnight chats. The video captures both the chaos and comfort of living with a girl-friend as a roomie.

programme.title: Life Of A Working Mother
programme.desc: The video portrays the challenges of balancing work and motherhood. It highlights her multitasking, sacrifices, and the love that drives her daily life.

programme.title: Moms During Board Exams
programme.desc: The dramatic shift a mom undergoes when her kid has board exams – transforming into a coach, counselor, cook, motivator, and sometimes panic-stricken overseer. Every worry, prayer, and pep talk is amplified in those days.

programme.title: Things You Shouldn't Say To Your Partner
programme.desc: Funny, awkward and borderline-dangerous phrases that one says to a partner (often unintentionally) that trigger eye-rolls, fights or long silences. The video shows how what we say matters — even when we don’t intend.

programme.title: Every Wedding Prep Ever (aka Shaadi Ki Taiyari)
programme.desc: Indian wedding planning is a tornado of outfit stress, nosy relatives, budget nightmares, and endless last-minute drama—all under one roof.

programme.title: Siblings: Expectation Vs Reality
programme.desc: What you want from your sibling (support and affection) rarely matches what you get (teasing, stealing food, and dramatic arguments). Yet somehow, love peeks through the chaos.

programme.title: When You Date A Malayali
programme.desc: This video humorously explores the distinctive characteristics and experiences of dating a Malayali individual. It highlights their cultural pride, love for Malayalam cinema and unique expressions, all in a comical and relatable manner.

programme.title: Signs That She Is The One
programme.desc: The video highlights the little signs that show yur partner is the one for you. It showcases sweet gestures, understanding, and moments of connection that make a relationship feel perfect.

programme.title: Struggles Of People With Pcod / Pcos
programme.desc: A candid, humorous look at the daily frustrations, symptoms, and misconceptions people with PCOD/PCOS face.

programme.title: Little Ways To Say I Love You (valentine's Day Special)

programme.title: Secret Romance

programme.title: When You Move To A New School

programme.title: When Opposites Fall In Love

programme.title: When Your Younger Sibling Is Excited For Diwali

programme.title: Childhood Memories We'll Never Forget
programme.desc: This Children's Day special video highlights the cherished and relatable childhood memories that individuals hold dear. It showcases heartwarming moments such as learning to spell, enjoying imaginary boat rides, and the innocent joys of growing up.

programme.title: When You Live To Eat
programme.desc: A tribute to every foodie who plans their day, mood, and relationships around food.

programme.title: Moving From A Small Town To A Big City
programme.desc: A heartfelt story about chasing dreams, culture shock, loneliness, and finally finding your place in the chaos.

programme.title: If Your Life Were A Rajinikanth Movie
programme.desc: Over-the-top drama, slow-mo entries, and impossible stunts—because life would be so much cooler with Rajini-style swag.

programme.title: School Lunch Breaks
programme.desc: The video captures the chaos and excitement of school lunch breaks. It highlights the rush, the friendships, and the small adventures that make those moments memorable.

programme.title: Hum Hain Rahi Pyar Ke
programme.desc: Ayesha writes a novel about her prostitution journey, trying to persuade sister Anu to let go of her past and start fresh.

programme.title: Bewaffa Se Waffa
programme.desc: After losing his wife in an accident, Anand gives his child to a widow who lost her baby. Anand is caught in a dilemma when his wife returns.

programme.title: Charanon Ki Saugandh
programme.desc: Childless Rukhsar convinces friend Nagma to marry her husband. Nagma's conniving uncle and aunt create misunderstandings. Will Rukhsar's marriage crumble?

programme.title: Dil Jo Na Keh Saka
programme.desc: Anil, a street performer with a tragic past, becomes India's top disco dancer. When his mother dies in a staged accident, he fights past demons and the man ruining his life.

programme.title: Gupt The Hidden Truth
programme.desc: Sahil Sinha loves Isha but his father insists on an arranged marriage. After an argument, Jaisingh dies. Sahil is blamed, jailed, and escapes to find the real killer.

programme.title: Rajkumar
programme.desc: Thambore & Araavali end enmity through marriage, but a fateful incident reignites rivalry. The prince's love for the princess is their only hope for peace.

programme.title: Baaz: A Bird In Danger
programme.desc: A serial killer targets beautiful women in Nainital. Police are on trail, while new corporate worker Neha Chopra gets entangled in the case.

programme.title: Annadata
programme.desc: Rich, rigid city man Pawan fetches his deceased brother's young son. His journey exposes him to less fortunate people, making him question his ideologies.

programme.title: Pavitra Paapi
programme.desc: Criminal Sultan raises orphan Badshah, who becomes a criminal. Badshah changes for street performer Sapna, but Sultan returns to remind him of his past.

programme.title: Deewaar
programme.desc: Brothers Vijay and Ravi Verma, sons of a disgraced unionist, follow different paths: Vijay, a smuggler; Ravi, a cop hunting him. Raised by their poor single mother in Bombay, they face hardships.

programme.title: Rickshawala
programme.desc: Siblings Radha and Ramu rise from poverty to become popular performers. Tragedy strikes. Ramu vows revenge on the man who exploited his mother, murdered his father, and tortured his sister.

programme.title: Maha Badmaash
programme.desc: Casino owner Ratan is forced to work for a gangster. When Ratan refuses to kill Commissioner Saxena, the gangster kidnaps his secretary and sister to blackmail him.

programme.title: Karz Chukana Hai
programme.desc: Rohan and Ayesha's relationship sours due to dating rumors. They part ways, only to realize their mistake.

programme.title: Dharam Veer
programme.desc: CBI officer Suraj learns childhood friend Yash and his father run an illegal business. Assigned to investigate, Suraj decides to convince Yash to change his ways.

programme.title: Amar Akbar Anthony
programme.desc: A family of five separates due to an incident. Brothers are raised in different religions. Years later, they reunite to avenge those responsible.

programme.title: Ab Kya Hoga
programme.desc: Vicky calls his father for his birthday and plans to propose. Father dies in an accident. Vicky and Rani go missing en route to meet him.

programme.title: Charitra Heen
programme.desc: A middle-class man marries a millionaire's daughter despite family opposition. Marital differences arise, and he finds solace with another woman.

programme.title: Daasi
programme.desc: Widowed Amrit and Kamala, ill-treated by their children, find solace together. They decide to leave their families and spend their lives together.

programme.title: Trishul
programme.desc: Vijay Kumar, illegitimate son of construction baron Raj Kumar Gupta, seeks revenge after his mother's death. He aims to destroy the Gupta family's business and connections.

programme.title: Dharti Kahe Pukarke
programme.desc: Poor farmers Gangaram and Shiv mortgage land for brother Moti's education. Unforeseen circumstances make loan repayment impossible, risking ancestral land.

programme.title: Bumper Draw
programme.desc: Spanish Laura travels to India seeking missing boyfriend Robert. Her quest leads to Paharganj's shady lanes, where she learns his disappearance is linked to a murder.

programme.title: Vinashak Destroyer
programme.desc: Brave police officer Arjun goes undercover as a criminal in prison to expose jailer Lankeshwar, an illegal arms dealer. Arjun faces trouble when his ally, Inspector Amar, is murdered.

programme.title: Vidhata
programme.desc: Kunal lives with influential grandfather Shamsher after parents' death, falls for Durga. Shamsher disapproves and plots to separate them.

programme.title: Naya Din Nayi Raat
programme.desc: A workaholic businessman suspects his wife of an affair and hires a young detective. His plan backfires when the detective falls for her.

programme.title: Ujala Hi Ujala
programme.desc: After Anuradha's mother dies, her father marries Anita. Anita hates Anuradha, forces her to drink to drive her out.

programme.title: Charitra Heen
programme.desc: A middle-class man marries a millionaire's daughter despite family opposition. Marital differences arise, and he finds solace with another woman.

programme.title: Flesh S1 Ep 2
programme.desc: Radha's career is on stake. Zoya goes missing and finds herself in the ruthless world of flesh trade.

programme.title: Flesh S1 Ep 3
programme.desc: A powerful cartel runs the flesh trade with a weirdo in charge. Radha gets strangely involved in Zoya's missing case.

programme.title: Flesh S1 Ep 4
programme.desc: Radha gets a crucial breakthrough in finding Zoya while power tussle is evident in the flesh cartel.

programme.title: Flesh S1 Ep 5
programme.desc: Taj tries everything to tighten his grip on the flesh business. Radha is approached by a strong ally within the force.

programme.title: Flesh S1 Ep 6
programme.desc: While Shekhar and Reba plead for Radha's help, Taj is getting more and more ruthless in his approach.

programme.title: Flesh S1 Ep 7
programme.desc: Shekhar is haunted by the ghosts from his past, which threatens Zoya's future. Taj finally shows his animalistic side.

programme.title: Flesh S1 Ep 8
programme.desc: Radha must face her worst nightmare. While she needs to save Zoya's life, her inner demon is making her weak.

programme.title: Bhoot Returns
programme.desc: Sequel to the horror film Bhoot in which a family moves into a house haunted by a ghost.

programme.title: Chaar Din Ki Chandni
programme.desc: This comedy-drama with an essence of romance is set in a four-day wedding in Rajasthan.

programme.title: Rockstar
programme.desc: Delhi boy Janardhan dreams of becoming a rockstar and falls for Heer. Heartbreak fuels his rise to fame, turning his pain into music as he transforms into a celebrated artist.

programme.title: Dekh Tamasha Dekh
programme.desc: A political satire based on a true story revolving around the search for the religious identity of a poor man crushed under the weight of a politician's hoarding.

programme.title: Jo Dooba So Paar
programme.desc: Keshu is hardly interested in the routine business of life. His life changes when he meets an Indian-Italian girl who is in India as part of her research.

programme.title: Golmaal In White House
programme.desc: Hai Golmaal In White House is a 1973 Indian Malayalam film, directed by Salar Shaikh. The film stars Rajpal Yadav, Govind Namdeo, Pratima Kazmi, Vijay Raaz, Yashpal Sharma in lead roles. The film had musical score by Shamir Tandon.

programme.title: Buddha Mar Gaya
programme.desc: When LK dies on the night before the IPO opens, the family decides to hide the death until the shares are all sold out.

programme.title: Raanjhanaa
programme.desc: A small-town boy, Kundan, needs to break through the class divide to gain acceptance from his childhood love who is in love with big city ideals.

programme.title: U Me Aur Hum
programme.desc: Ajay and Pia's world comes crashing down when Pia is diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease. But the two don't give up in the worse of times.

programme.title: Dhuntaaraa
programme.desc: A thriller for children, Dhuntara is a fun film that traces moments of 4 urban children who discover a new friend in a new place and the mystery that follows.

programme.title: Always Kabhi Kabhi
programme.desc: The film revolves around four characters whose destinies seem to take them on different paths. Somehow, though, they all come together at St.Marks.

programme.title: Hum Tumhare Hain Sanam
programme.desc: A man who loves his wife dearly feels that she is giving undue attention to her friend. As a result, he grows very suspicious resulting in throwing his wife out of the house after his jealousy completely overwhelms him.

programme.title: Sardaar Gabbar Singh
programme.desc: A battle of good over evil ensues when a righteous cop sets out to rescue a village from the wrath of a cruel ruler.

programme.title: Gang
programme.desc: Four friends, lured by quick money, form a dangerous gang undertaking criminal activities all the while completely ignoring how it affects their personal relationships.

programme.title: Partner
programme.desc: Bhaskar seeks help from “Love Guru” Prem to win over Priya. But their plans backfire, leading to hilarious misunderstandings. Will they succeed in love?

programme.title: Lootera
programme.desc: A story of a con artist, Varun who falls in love with Pakhi, daughter of a wealthy landowner. Varun and his partner deceive Pakhi's father by pretending to be archaeologists in search of a hidden treasure. But their plan goes awry when Varun starts to develop genuine feelings for Pakhi. Their love story is a poignant and tragic tale of sacrifice and redemption.

programme.title: Dear Maya
programme.desc: Anna and Ira prank a local woman by writing her letters from a secret admirer. However, the prank takes a more serious turn when the local woman goes missing.

programme.title: Powerful Game
programme.desc: A man unravels the mysteries of his past and his upbringing while settling a village feud.

programme.title: Ragini Mms
programme.desc: A horror film that follows the story of a couple, who visit a secluded farmhouse for a weekend getaway. However, their vacation turns into a nightmare when they realize they are not alone and their intimate moments are being recorded. The movie features suspenseful thrills and explores themes of voyeurism and supernatural terror in a unsettling plot.

programme.title: Omerta
programme.desc: Omerta (2018) is a gripping biographical thriller about Ahmed Omar Saeed Sheikh, a British-born terrorist involved in kidnappings and the murder of journalist Daniel Pearl.

programme.title: Mission Istanbul
programme.desc: An action thriller film that follows the story of a journalist, Vikas, who is sent to Istanbul to cover a breaking news story. However, he becomes embroiled in a dangerous conspiracy involving international terrorism and political corruption. The movie features high-octane action sequences and explores themes of courage, patriotism, and the importance of journalistic integrity in a thrilling and suspenseful plot.

programme.title: Buddha Mar Gaya
programme.desc: Laxmikant Kabadiya and his twin sister, Prerna, have made it to the top from the very bottom, and now -- as they are about to land their greatest windfall of all -- an untimely and messy family death spoils their plans.

programme.title: Parwana
programme.desc: Parwana spends his days brightening the lives of the downtrodden with a series of odd jobs. Just as Parwana falls in love and marries the girl of his dreams, a group of vicious criminals label him a traitor and Parwana is thrown behind bars. Despite the mafia's best attempts to permanently silent Parwana as he languishes in jail, the daring hero escapes and sets out on a mission to clear his name and expose the real criminals.

programme.title: Ilaka (peddupettai)
programme.desc: Crime drama about Kumar, a man who rises from a slum to become a powerful figure in the underworld after witnessing his mother's murder. Driven by ambition and vengeance, he navigates betrayal and crime.

programme.title: No Problem
programme.desc: Raj is determined to lead an honest life and quit committing petty crimes. However, his friend and accomplice, Yash, always lands them in trouble and leads him further away from a crime-free life.

programme.title: Madhoshi
programme.desc: Despite being engaged to Arpit, Anupama falls in love with Aman, a stranger. However, when her family members decide to meet him, they are shocked to discover that a person named Aman does not exist.

programme.title: Jai Balaji Mehndipur Wale
programme.desc: The film is based on the famous Jai Balaji Mehandipur Wale temple in Rajasthan

programme.title: Mere Jeevan Sathi
programme.desc: Back in college, Natasha (Karisma Kapoor) was obsessed with Vicky (Akshay Kumar), who has become a successful rock star. Nothing ever happened between them, however. At the time, Vicky was in love with Anjali (Amisha Patel), who one fateful night suffered a great loss because of him. Now Natasha is the owner of a music label and has the power to make Vicky a global phenomenon. While Vicky, who is still with Anjali, wants to keep things professional, Natasha isn't about to take no for an answer.

programme.title: Joshila Janbaz
programme.desc: Bhagvathi, a tea vendor, has big dreams for his younger brother, Guna. However, Guna gets killed by his girlfriend's father, who is unaware that his daughter is pregnant.

programme.title: Yamla Pagla Deewana
programme.desc: Dharam (Dharmendra) and Gajodhar (Bobby Deol) are a father-son con team skilled in tricking their unsuspecting fellow Indians. When a nonresident Indian, Paramvir (Sunny Deol), arrives from Vancouver claiming to be Dharam's long-lost son, the duo doesn't buy it, but they admire his strength and take him into their fold. Eventually Gajodhar falls for a young woman, Saheba (Kulraj Randhawa). But when Saheba's brothers disapprove of the match, Paramvir designs a plan for Gajodhar to win her back.

programme.title: Ragini Mms 2
programme.desc: A director attempts to shoot an erotic horror movie in a house where, unbeknown to him, a demonic spirit resides. Even before the crew starts filming, the spirit possesses the lead actress's body.

programme.title: Undertrial
programme.desc: Sagar Hussain, a factory worker, is falsely accused of and imprisoned for raping his own daughters. Later, when his lawyer digs deeper, the truth reveals itself to be much worse than imagined.

programme.title: Yamla Pagla Deewana

Eventually Gajodhar falls for a young woman, Saheba (Kulraj Randhawa). But when Saheba's brothers disapprove of the match, Paramvir designs a plan for Gajodhar to win her back.

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: We control the fear, you understand? Without the fear, we are all good as dead.’ The notorious gangster Al Capone observed that “Prohibition has made nothing but trouble,” and “I am like any other man. All I do is supply a demand.” Acclaimed director delivers a thrillingly vivid slice of American outlaw history in his epic gangster tale, LAWLESS. LAWLESS is the true story of the infamous Bondurant Brothers: three bootlegging siblings who made a run for the American Dream in Prohibition-era Virginia. The film gathers an ensemble of gifted, dynamic new-generation stars – Tom Hardy, Shia LaBeouf, Jessica Chastain, Jason Clarke, Mia Wasikowska, Dane DeHaan – alongside two of the finest actors of their generations, Guy Pearce and Gary Oldman. A riveting, intense story of Crime and Corruption, Loyalty and Love, Brutality and Tenderness, LAWLESS is a rich addition to the American Gangster Canon.

programme.title: Tekken: Kazuya's Revenge
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, a young man trying to discover his true identity is kidnapped by an underground crime organization and turned into a ruthless assassin

programme.title: Sky Sharks
programme.desc: Deep in the ice of the antarctic, a team of geologists uncover an old Nazi warship still intact where dark experiments had occurred. In order to conquer the world, the Nazis created rocket-powered sharks whose pilots are genetically mutated, super soldiers with supernatural powers who were able to fly & destroy

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Regeneration
programme.desc: Terrorists kidnap the Russian Prime Minister's two kids, take Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant and threaten to blow up a reactor. Four Universal Soldiers go in but are no match to a Next Generation UniSol. The world's only hope is to reactivate decommissioned Universal Soldier Luc Deveraux.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: Every 23rd spring for 23days, it gets to eat…Stranded on a lonely road, a school bus full of high school players must defend themselves from the Creeper, the winged, flesh-eating terror - ancient beast that resurfaces on the earth every 23 years to feed.

programme.title: Rebel
programme.desc: A young man leaves Belgium to help war victims in Syria, but is forced to join an armed group and is left stranded in AL Raqqa. While at home his little brother becomes easy prey for jihadi recruiters. The only thing their mother has left with is to protect: her Son.

programme.title: The Free Fall
programme.desc: The Free Fall is a deeply personal horror thriller, a mind bending pressure cooker that constantly challenges us, hurling us towards one of the most shocking cinematic reveals imaginable. After attempting to take her own life, a young woman must wrestle with an overbearing husband and the only way out of this hell, is to fall into it.

programme.title: Tekken: Kazuya's Revenge
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, a young man trying to discover his true identity is kidnapped by an underground crime organization and turned into a ruthless assassin

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Steven Soderbergh of Ocean’s 11, 12 & 13 comes HAYWIRE. A Female Assassin covert operative is hired to various global missions to perform jobs which governments can't authorize. When the operation goes awry, she needs to use all of her skills & tricks to escape an international manhunt and eliminate the last remaining link of the conspiracy against her.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Night Courier
programme.desc: From a struggling delivery man to the depths of a city's underworld, where desperation and opportunity collide, and this tantalizing opportunity comes at a great cost. Fahad a mentally fragile man racing against time must risk everything he holds dear, including his principles and the fragile sanity he clings to.

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Redline is an auto/action thriller that features an extensive exotic car collection Phantom Rolls Royce, Lamborghini Murcielago, Enzo Ferrari, Ferrari F430, Ferrari Scaglietti and two Mercedes SLR McLaren AMGs. The film follows a gorgeous young automobile fanaticize driver who becomes part of illegal drag racing competitions organized by exotic car fanatics.

programme.title: Out Of Death
programme.desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

programme.title: Rebel
programme.desc: A young man leaves Belgium to help war victims in Syria, but is forced to join an armed group and is left stranded in AL Raqqa. While at home his little brother becomes easy prey for jihadi recruiters. The only thing their mother has left with is to protect: her Son.

programme.title: The Catcher Was A Spy
programme.desc: With an ensemble cast, this gripping, espionage thriller brings to life the true story of Moe Berg a World War II spy. His mission: go behind enemy lines in Europe to assassinate the Nazi's chief nuclear scientist before the Germans develop an atomic bomb. Berg must rely on his steel-trap intellect in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse - with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan

Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Aileen Wuornos: American Boogeywoman
programme.desc: True Story that follows America’s most notorious Female Serial killer. Based on Aileen Wuorno’s early life. Back in 1976 a young Aileen arrives in Florida searching for a new life, marries a wealthy yacht club president to start as part of Florida’s high society. Tormented by her inner demons she surrenders to her murderous impulses havoc in the peaceful community.

programme.title: Riders Of Justice
programme.desc: Markus goes home to his teenage daughter, Mathilde, when his wife dies in a train crash. All appears to be a tragic accident until a mathematics geek, who was also a fellow passenger on the train, and his two colleagues show up.

programme.title: Ted Bundy: American Boogeyman
programme.desc: This is the true story behind the manhunt that brought America’s most fearsome boogeyman to justice. His name is Ted Bundy. A specter roams the highways of the gritty 1970s America hunting for his next prey. Tracking him are intrepid FBI female agent Kathleen & Robert Ressler organizers of the largest manhunt in history to apprehend America’s most Notorious infamous serial killer.

programme.title: Out Of Death
programme.desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

programme.title: The Catcher Was A Spy
programme.desc: With an ensemble cast, this gripping, espionage thriller brings to life the true story of Moe Berg a World War II spy. His mission: go behind enemy lines in Europe to assassinate the Nazi's chief nuclear scientist before the Germans develop an atomic bomb. Berg must rely on his steel-trap intellect in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse - with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.

programme.title: Rebel
programme.desc: A young man leaves Belgium to help war victims in Syria, but is forced to join an armed group and is left stranded in AL Raqqa. While at home his little brother becomes easy prey for jihadi recruiters. The only thing their mother has left with is to protect: her Son.

programme.title: Night Courier
programme.desc: From a struggling delivery man to the depths of a city's underworld, where desperation and opportunity collide, and this tantalizing opportunity comes at a great cost. Fahad a mentally fragile man racing against time must risk everything he holds dear, including his principles and the fragile sanity he clings to.

programme.title: The Hurt Locker
programme.desc: THE HURT LOCKER is an intense portrayal of elite soldiers who have one of the most dangerous jobs in the world: disarming bombs during the Iraq War.

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Redline is an auto/action thriller that features an extensive exotic car collection Phantom Rolls Royce, Lamborghini Murcielago, Enzo Ferrari, Ferrari F430, Ferrari Scaglietti and two Mercedes SLR McLaren AMGs. The film follows a gorgeous young automobile fanaticize driver who becomes part of illegal drag racing competitions organized by exotic car fanatics.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Out Of Death
programme.desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: Every 23rd spring for 23days, it gets to eat…Stranded on a lonely road, a school bus full of high school players must defend themselves from the Creeper, the winged, flesh-eating terror - ancient beast that resurfaces on the earth every 23 years to feed.

programme.title: Ittefaq
programme.desc: Dilip Roy is a painter by trade and, despite possessing a beautiful wife called Sushma, he spends most of his time painting. On the day of their anniversary celebration, Dilip is late finishing a painting when a frustrated Sushma snatches the brush from his hand. Furious, Dilip strangles her to death, is arrested and sent to a psychiatric institute.

programme.title: Tyagi
programme.desc: Shankar takes the blame when one of his brothers is accused of a murder. However, when he returns from jail, he realises that his brothers are trying to create a rift in the family.

programme.title: Sagar Sangam
programme.desc: Upon growing to be a criminal, Gopi's conviction sends him to Devipur where he uncovers the truth about his traumatic childhood and sets off to seek revenge.

programme.desc: When the son of a landlord decides to modernize his business by replacing the horse carts with buses, a horse cart rider decides to challenge him.

programme.title: Param Dharam
programme.desc: Savitri believes that her illegitimate child with her deceased lover, Vijay, was stillborn and did not survive. Years later, Savitri's world changes when she learns that her firstborn is alive.

programme.title: Adalat
programme.desc: Village bred farmer, brave, and honest, Dharamchand alias Dharma is thrilled when his wife, Radha, gives birth to a baby boy, who they decide to call Raju. Dharma comes to the rescue of Ajit, Suresh, and Sujit, when they are being attacked by a tiger, and they graciously offer him a job in Bombay whenever he needs it. When the region experiences drought, Dharma, Radha, Raju and Dharma's sister, Laxmi, re-locate to Bombay, where Ajit makes Dharma the Manager of his warehouse.

programme.desc: Shankar a simple villager comes to Bombay in such of work to improve his financial condition but circumstances force him to take up smuggling.

programme.desc: Two young friends are raised in the same orphanage by an affectionate warden. Although they promise her not to stray, fate makes them the biggest gangsters in town. Will she be able to save them now?

programme.title: Izzat
programme.desc: Constable Ram Chandra teaches his son Siddharth to be a diligent policeman and lead his life with honesty and dignity. Siddharth follows his advice until circumstances force him to leave his ideals.

programme.title: Sholay
programme.desc: In the village of Ramgarh, retired police chief Thakur Baldev Singh (Sanjeev Kumar) plots to bring down the notorious bandit Gabbar Singh (Amjad Khan) and enlists the help of two lesser criminals, Jai (Amitabh Bachchan) and Veeru (Dharmendra). When Gabbar attacks the village, however, Jai and Veeru wonder why Thakur does nothing to help them. They soon learn that he has no arms, and that Gabbar was the one who cut them off. Enraged by this, they redouble their efforts to help.

programme.title: Mera Desh Mera Dharam
programme.desc: Mera Desh Mera Dharam " is a story of the brave sons of a Land now called Bangla Desh. The People of the land responsed to the call of their beloved leader Sheikh Mujibur Rebman and lay down their lives to get free from the clutches of a Military Dictator. The episode of the story reveals the difference between Dictatorship and the Democracy and a litrary hint to all the people of the World particularly to the Indian Sub-continent that is not to bank upen your religion for self defence but the country as a whole. There was a time when people used to defend themselves under the name and banner of a Dharam but today Dharam should be ones own personal affairs to guide him to be a good character and re-union with God after that. But the States affairs should be left to presnt Society which naturally combined of multi-religions and multi-races. The charactors those who playned their parts can only be judged by previewing the movie. How cruel a man can be to remain in power, how sentiment I and sacrifying a man can be to get freedom. you can see in t he movie.

programme.title: Agnee Prem
programme.desc: The film is a love story between a rich girl and middle class boy. The girls stepmother is against the alliance so they run away. they are helped by a lawyer. programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 01
programme.desc: What happens when a fearless Delhi boy meets a fiery Mumbai girl? Chaos, charm, and clashes ensue. Will opposites attract or collide? Watch Alright's new weekly web series - Delhi vs Mumbai's episode 1 - When Delhi guy meets Mumbai girl.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 02
programme.desc: In this hilarious episode 2 of Delhi vs Mumbai, our favorite duo is on an all-too-relatable mission: flat hunting! ?? From endless negotiations with brokers in Delhi ?? to squeezing into Mumbai’s tiny flats ???, the chaos is real. Will Chirag find his home in this city or not?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 03
programme.desc: Imagine living with your crush amidst the iconic Delhi vs Mumbai clash—where one city’s chaos meets the other’s charm, turning every day into a blend of cultures and a rom-com adventure. Sharing breakfasts, late-night talks, and unexpected quirks, is it a dream come true or a reality check? Living with your crush in such a whirlwind brings fantasy and reality head-to-head like never before!

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 04
programme.desc: What happens when opposites fall in love? Chaos, comedy, or the ultimate love story? Delhi vs Mumbai—where one orders butter chicken, the other swears by vada pav. One speeds through wide highways, the other navigates traffic like an art form. From “Bhai” to “Banta hai,” their worlds clash in a battle of slang, street food, and stubborn pride. But here’s the twist—somehow, between the endless debates and culture shocks, sparks fly. Is it war, or is it love? Maybe, just maybe, it’s both.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 05
programme.desc: Say no to Valentine’s Day when your boyfriend is too romantic, and you’re the complete opposite! One loves grand gestures, the other prefers chill vibes—can love survive this Delhi vs Mumbai clash?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 06
programme.desc: When your partner is a walking green flag, every day feels like a rom-com—thoughtful gestures, endless support, and no unnecessary drama. From remembering your coffee order to hyping you up like their full-time job, they seem too good to be true. But in a world full of red flags, is it possible to find someone this perfect, or is there a twist waiting to unfold?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 07
programme.desc: Who truly has your back—your boyfriend or your best friend? ?? In this episode of Delhi vs Mumbai, we put relationships to the ultimate test! From loyalty checks to emotional dilemmas, watch as Delhi and Mumbai episode 7 to prove whose squad reigns supreme.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 08
programme.desc: When your partner cheats on you, the signs can be subtle or right in your face—but are they real, or just overthinking? A sudden change in behaviour, secretive texts, and those mysterious "work calls" at odd hours—are you reading too much between the lines or just ignoring the signs?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 09
programme.desc: Ex ki waapsi is always when you’ve finally moved on. The memories resurface, the what-ifs linger… but will you turn the page or reopen the book? Is it fate giving you another chance, or just a test to see if you’ve really moved on?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 10
programme.desc: Holi with Girlfriend is nothing short of magical—colours in the air, laughter in every splash, and love in every stolen glance. As you chase each other with vibrant hues, the world fades, leaving just the two of you in a whirlwind of playful mischief and stolen kisses. Amidst the chaos of colours, one thing is certain—her smile is the brightest shade of happiness.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 11
programme.desc: When your girlfriend wants to pay, it’s a true test of modern love—are you chivalrous enough to insist, or progressive enough to accept? The debate begins: Is it about equality, or does footing the bill define a gentleman? The waiter awkwardly stands by as you both exchange glances, waiting to see who taps the card first. In the end, is love about splitting everything equally, or about knowing when to let the other person win?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 12
programme.desc: Ruhaani from Mumbai travels to Delhi to meet Chirag’s family—who also happens to be her boyfriend. As she navigates the warmth and chaos of Delhi's culture, she uncovers surprising truths about his family, their expectations, and where she truly stands in his life.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 13
programme.desc: In Episode 13, Ruhani’s lavish surprise for Chirag collides with his secret plan to move back to Delhi for his mother and a major opportunity, leading to an emotional confrontation that tests their love and leaves both with a bittersweet, unsent goodbye.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 14
programme.desc: In the gripping final episode of Delhi vs Mumbai, emotions run high as Chirag (Abhishek Kapoor) and Ruhani (Malhaar Rathod) face the ultimate test of love. With tough decisions about career, family, and their future together, will distance and city-based differences pull them apart — or will love triumph over all?

programme.title: Dude Ep 01
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 02
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 05
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 01
programme.desc: In a busy hospital, Trisha faces a tough night when an accident victim is rushed into the emergency ward. As she works to save his life, the victim’s panicked father lashes out at her, demanding faster treatment. But Trisha stays calm, knowing that fear often comes out as anger.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 02
programme.desc: Trisha steps up when it matters most. When a man begins to choke and the situation turns critical, Trisha doesn’t hesitate. With calm precision and unmatched courage, she performs a high-stakes procedure all on her own. What happens next is nothing short of remarkable. Her quick thinking and skill become the difference between life and death. Watch how one nurse turns pressure into action.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 03
programme.desc: Trisha decides to take a long leave from the hospital to spend much-needed time with her family. Just as she steps away, the hospital is hit with a major emergency. Without hesitation, Trisha returns to duty, putting others before herself and becoming a true hero in a time of crisis. Watch this heartfelt story of courage, sacrifice, and the dilemma between duty and family.

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 01
programme.desc: n Harshil’s mohalla, love arrives every Diwali — bright, sparkly… but never quite complete Every year he promises himself — this time I’ll confess! But between mithai, fireworks and nerves… he ends up saying, “maybe next Diwali.” This year, he’s all set to confess his love to his Diwali wali dost — but will she say yes? Or will a new twist steal the spotlight?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 02
programme.desc: In Harshil’s mohalla, love has finally met its competition. After years of dancing through every Diwali together, Anamika now takes the floor with Vishal — and suddenly, it’s not just a performance, it’s personal.

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 03
programme.desc: Harshil ke chehre pe muskaan kam aur dard zyada nazar aa raha hai — kyunki ab Anamika aur Vishal ki “perfect jodi” ek "forever jodi" banne jaa rahi hai. Par iss kahani mein sab kuch utna simple nahi jitna lagta hai — Vishal ne bhi dekh liya hai wo bond… wo Mohalle Wala Pyaar Kya usse lagega kuch gadbad hai? Kya Anamika samajh payegi kya chubh raha hai Harshil ko? Aur kya iss Diwali… ek dil tootega ya do dil judenge?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 04
programme.desc: This Diwali, not just diyas — hearts are breaking too Vishal’s jealousy has sparked a storm, and Harshil’s world just fell apart. One Ghargula shattered… but along with it, so did a bond built over years. Will Anamika see the truth before it’s too late?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 05
programme.desc: The fights. The silence. The misunderstandings. It all comes down to this night. As the mohalla lights up for Diwali, two hearts are still trying to find their way back to each other. Will Harshil and Anamika finally find their way back… or lose each other forever?

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 01
programme.desc: Episode 1 of Office Dancers takes you inside the world of three ordinary office-goers with one extraordinary secret — they are the dancing stars no one sees coming. By day, they’re buried in emails, meetings, and deadlines. By night, they’re chasing rhythm, passion, and dreams that refuse to stay hidden. This is where their journey begins — full of chaos, comedy, and courage.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 02
programme.desc: Our three office rebels are back — and the chaos only gets bigger. Between never-ending deadlines, secret rehearsals, and the constant fear of getting caught… will their double life survive another day? ?? This episode is a reminder that sometimes the smallest victories — a dance step nailed, a dream defended, a smile shared — are the ones that keep us alive in the middle of all the madness.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 03
programme.desc: The helmets are still on, but the stakes just got higher. Our office dancers are juggling tighter deadlines, tougher bosses, and an even bigger risk of exposure. In this episode, friendships are tested, rivalries heat up, and every beat brings them closer to the truth. Because sometimes the hardest battle isn’t with the world outside — it’s with the fear inside.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 01
programme.desc: What happens when a fearless Delhi boy meets a fiery Mumbai girl? Chaos, charm, and clashes ensue. Will opposites attract or collide? Watch Alright's new weekly web series - Delhi vs Mumbai's episode 1 - When Delhi guy meets Mumbai girl.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 02
programme.desc: In this hilarious episode 2 of Delhi vs Mumbai, our favorite duo is on an all-too-relatable mission: flat hunting! ?? From endless negotiations with brokers in Delhi ?? to squeezing into Mumbai’s tiny flats ???, the chaos is real. Will Chirag find his home in this city or not?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 03
programme.desc: Imagine living with your crush amidst the iconic Delhi vs Mumbai clash—where one city’s chaos meets the other’s charm, turning every day into a blend of cultures and a rom-com adventure. Sharing breakfasts, late-night talks, and unexpected quirks, is it a dream come true or a reality check? Living with your crush in such a whirlwind brings fantasy and reality head-to-head like never before!

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 04
programme.desc: What happens when opposites fall in love? Chaos, comedy, or the ultimate love story? Delhi vs Mumbai—where one orders butter chicken, the other swears by vada pav. One speeds through wide highways, the other navigates traffic like an art form. From “Bhai” to “Banta hai,” their worlds clash in a battle of slang, street food, and stubborn pride. But here’s the twist—somehow, between the endless debates and culture shocks, sparks fly. Is it war, or is it love? Maybe, just maybe, it’s both.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 05
programme.desc: Say no to Valentine’s Day when your boyfriend is too romantic, and you’re the complete opposite! One loves grand gestures, the other prefers chill vibes—can love survive this Delhi vs Mumbai clash?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 06
programme.desc: When your partner is a walking green flag, every day feels like a rom-com—thoughtful gestures, endless support, and no unnecessary drama. From remembering your coffee order to hyping you up like their full-time job, they seem too good to be true. But in a world full of red flags, is it possible to find someone this perfect, or is there a twist waiting to unfold?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 07
programme.desc: Who truly has your back—your boyfriend or your best friend? ?? In this episode of Delhi vs Mumbai, we put relationships to the ultimate test! From loyalty checks to emotional dilemmas, watch as Delhi and Mumbai episode 7 to prove whose squad reigns supreme.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 08
programme.desc: When your partner cheats on you, the signs can be subtle or right in your face—but are they real, or just overthinking? A sudden change in behaviour, secretive texts, and those mysterious "work calls" at odd hours—are you reading too much between the lines or just ignoring the signs?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 09
programme.desc: Ex ki waapsi is always when you’ve finally moved on. The memories resurface, the what-ifs linger… but will you turn the page or reopen the book? Is it fate giving you another chance, or just a test to see if you’ve really moved on?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 10
programme.desc: Holi with Girlfriend is nothing short of magical—colours in the air, laughter in every splash, and love in every stolen glance. As you chase each other with vibrant hues, the world fades, leaving just the two of you in a whirlwind of playful mischief and stolen kisses. Amidst the chaos of colours, one thing is certain—her smile is the brightest shade of happiness.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 11
programme.desc: When your girlfriend wants to pay, it’s a true test of modern love—are you chivalrous enough to insist, or progressive enough to accept? The debate begins: Is it about equality, or does footing the bill define a gentleman? The waiter awkwardly stands by as you both exchange glances, waiting to see who taps the card first. In the end, is love about splitting everything equally, or about knowing when to let the other person win?

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 12
programme.desc: Ruhaani from Mumbai travels to Delhi to meet Chirag’s family—who also happens to be her boyfriend. As she navigates the warmth and chaos of Delhi's culture, she uncovers surprising truths about his family, their expectations, and where she truly stands in his life.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 13
programme.desc: In Episode 13, Ruhani’s lavish surprise for Chirag collides with his secret plan to move back to Delhi for his mother and a major opportunity, leading to an emotional confrontation that tests their love and leaves both with a bittersweet, unsent goodbye.

programme.title: Delhi Vs Mumbai S1 Ep 14
programme.desc: In the gripping final episode of Delhi vs Mumbai, emotions run high as Chirag (Abhishek Kapoor) and Ruhani (Malhaar Rathod) face the ultimate test of love. With tough decisions about career, family, and their future together, will distance and city-based differences pull them apart — or will love triumph over all?

programme.title: Dude Ep 01
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 02
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Dude Ep 05
programme.desc: Dude depicts the life of a detective, scrambling to hunt down the answers behind a baffling case. It reels him into twisted relationships filled with perplexing events. And the more he tries to untangle the truth, the more convoluted it becomes.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 01
programme.desc: In a busy hospital, Trisha faces a tough night when an accident victim is rushed into the emergency ward. As she works to save his life, the victim’s panicked father lashes out at her, demanding faster treatment. But Trisha stays calm, knowing that fear often comes out as anger.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 02
programme.desc: Trisha steps up when it matters most. When a man begins to choke and the situation turns critical, Trisha doesn’t hesitate. With calm precision and unmatched courage, she performs a high-stakes procedure all on her own. What happens next is nothing short of remarkable. Her quick thinking and skill become the difference between life and death. Watch how one nurse turns pressure into action.

programme.title: Emergency Room Ep 03
programme.desc: Trisha decides to take a long leave from the hospital to spend much-needed time with her family. Just as she steps away, the hospital is hit with a major emergency. Without hesitation, Trisha returns to duty, putting others before herself and becoming a true hero in a time of crisis. Watch this heartfelt story of courage, sacrifice, and the dilemma between duty and family.

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 01
programme.desc: n Harshil’s mohalla, love arrives every Diwali — bright, sparkly… but never quite complete Every year he promises himself — this time I’ll confess! But between mithai, fireworks and nerves… he ends up saying, “maybe next Diwali.” This year, he’s all set to confess his love to his Diwali wali dost — but will she say yes? Or will a new twist steal the spotlight?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 02
programme.desc: In Harshil’s mohalla, love has finally met its competition. After years of dancing through every Diwali together, Anamika now takes the floor with Vishal — and suddenly, it’s not just a performance, it’s personal.

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 03
programme.desc: Harshil ke chehre pe muskaan kam aur dard zyada nazar aa raha hai — kyunki ab Anamika aur Vishal ki “perfect jodi” ek "forever jodi" banne jaa rahi hai. Par iss kahani mein sab kuch utna simple nahi jitna lagta hai — Vishal ne bhi dekh liya hai wo bond… wo Mohalle Wala Pyaar Kya usse lagega kuch gadbad hai? Kya Anamika samajh payegi kya chubh raha hai Harshil ko? Aur kya iss Diwali… ek dil tootega ya do dil judenge?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 04
programme.desc: This Diwali, not just diyas — hearts are breaking too Vishal’s jealousy has sparked a storm, and Harshil’s world just fell apart. One Ghargula shattered… but along with it, so did a bond built over years. Will Anamika see the truth before it’s too late?

programme.title: Mohalle Wala Pyaar Ep 05
programme.desc: The fights. The silence. The misunderstandings. It all comes down to this night. As the mohalla lights up for Diwali, two hearts are still trying to find their way back to each other. Will Harshil and Anamika finally find their way back… or lose each other forever?

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 01
programme.desc: Episode 1 of Office Dancers takes you inside the world of three ordinary office-goers with one extraordinary secret — they are the dancing stars no one sees coming. By day, they’re buried in emails, meetings, and deadlines. By night, they’re chasing rhythm, passion, and dreams that refuse to stay hidden. This is where their journey begins — full of chaos, comedy, and courage.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 02
programme.desc: Our three office rebels are back — and the chaos only gets bigger. Between never-ending deadlines, secret rehearsals, and the constant fear of getting caught… will their double life survive another day? ?? This episode is a reminder that sometimes the smallest victories — a dance step nailed, a dream defended, a smile shared — are the ones that keep us alive in the middle of all the madness.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 03
programme.desc: The helmets are still on, but the stakes just got higher. Our office dancers are juggling tighter deadlines, tougher bosses, and an even bigger risk of exposure. In this episode, friendships are tested, rivalries heat up, and every beat brings them closer to the truth. Because sometimes the hardest battle isn’t with the world outside — it’s with the fear inside.

programme.title: Office Dancers Ep 04

Trust wobbles, secrets leak, and every rehearsal feels like a trap. Will the masks stay on—or is this the episode their identities finally crack?

programme.title: Kuch Love Jaisa Ep 01

programme.title: Kuch Love Jaisa Ep 02
programme.desc: Witnessing Ayush's behavior at school, Roshni declares Shashank an irresponsible father. However, upon learning about their family situation, she changes her mind.

programme.title: Kuch Love Jaisa Ep 03
programme.desc: Ever heard of enemies turning into lovers? Well, Shashank and Roshni's relationship takes a new turn. But looking at their new forming bond, Ayush and Giya get worried. Find out what decision they take next.

programme.title: Kuch Love Jaisa Ep 04
programme.desc: A kiss can change everything. Confused about what they should do next, Shashank and Roshni decide to part ways. Is this the end of their story?

programme.desc: As things take an unexpected turn when Rachit finds himself on a date with the new girl in the office, Kashvi. What starts as a casual meet up in party quickly evolves into something more as they navigate the blurry lines between professional and personal.

programme.title: Office Ka Pyaar Ep 02
